name: Dewald Visser
role: Founder, Growth Marketer, Designer, Systems Builder
heroPosition: I connect strategy, campaigns, design, websites and practical AI adoption into systems that help brands move.
aboutHeadline: A founder-operator across brand, marketing, web systems and AI enablement, built for teams that need the thinking and the making in one place.
aboutBody: Founder of Sun Paper and Coatings and a creative systems builder — brand, marketing, web and practical AI under one roof. From founding my own agency to running live production for 500-strong audiences and turning a tangled quoting spreadsheet into a working web tool, I connect strategy, design and operations so ideas ship as systems, not just assets.
